series_metadata.series_description: Records pertaining to the Research Incentive Program including, but not limited to: Requests for Proposals; proposals submitted by each campus; External reviewer reports from peer review panel members; A final report summarizing the review findings and funding recommendations going to the Chancellor; Reports from the campuses on their use of funds, including such reports as expenditures, success stories, and leverage of external funds; and annual reports on research and development activities at each campus.

retention_rules.trigger_event: Electronic: following end of each awarded program''s funding
